home.description: Typical dishes cooked with love and the best ingredients. A cozy space where you feel at home.
home.featured_subtitle: *These are examples only. Our daily menu varies based on fresh ingredients.*
home.why_choose_subtitle: Three reasons that make Pérola do Vouga your preferred gastronomic destination
home.visit_description: We're a neighborhood spot in Lisbon. Good food, simple setting, real people.

roots.subtitle: Family Tradition
roots.title: Flavors That Bring Us Together
roots.description1: Pérola do Vouga was born with the goal of serving the best traditional Portuguese gastronomy in an environment that makes you feel at home.
roots.description2: Fresh ingredients, family recipes, and care in every dish.

authentic.title: No Tricks
authentic.description: We cook real food. Same old recipes, fresh ingredients from the market.

cozy.title: Feels Like Home
cozy.description: Small, simple, welcoming. Here, it's all about the food and the people.

quality.title: Fair Prices
quality.description: Good food doesn't have to cost a fortune. Quality at honest prices, every day.

menu.title: Daily Menu / Orders
menu.subtitle: Explore our selection of delicious dishes, prepared with fresh and local ingredients.
